title: ALTARA
description: ALTARA is a Minecraft mod that adds new items, tools, and mechanics to make the game more exciting and diverse.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d6171482147ce68b6d76cb0dd008dc80672e82b_0.webp)
---

**ALTARA** is a Minecraft mod that **adds new items, tools, and mechanics** while keeping the **vanilla Minecraft feel**.

---

Follow the official ALTARA updates on X: [@altaraMC](https://x.com/altaraMC)

---

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/086b0927ea14272ff6cb8104508e132b6c5e222a.png)
- **Unique Weapons & Tools** – Change how you fight, mine, and explore.  
- **New Mechanics** – Make your world more dynamic and engaging.  
- **Balanced Additions** – Blend naturally with Minecraft’s core style. 
- **See all the updates here :**  [Changelog](https://modrinth.com/mod/ALTARA/changelog)

---

![benefits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7915c34ae2b33d00fa59e8d2992486888929ab07.png)

- **More Creativity** – Expand how you approach the game.  
- **Replayability** – Depth without breaking vanilla.  
- **Challenges & Rewards** – Fun and fair gameplay.  

---

![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7871083cba74fc113a8a1baeb9b74bfbe0ea7bd.png)

- **Minecraft** – Singleplayer & Multiplayer  
- **Languages** – English (more coming)  

---

### 🚀 Get Started!

Make your Minecraft world richer and more exciting with **ALTARA**!

---

💡 **Note:** JEI (**Just Enough Items**) is **HIGHLY recommended** so you can easily view recipes and quickly find mod items

---
